parsed.availability_comment: Available for the published early PBKS phase absent late matchday changes.
parsed.availability_note: Named in South Africa's January 2026 T20 World Cup squad and listed in PBKS 2026 squad/match squad; no current injury or withdrawal report found. First-phase IPL schedule only is published here, so projection remains phase-limited.
parsed.followup_reason: Need official toss/XI evidence from 2026-03-31 onward to confirm whether he beats other overseas options into the starting four.
parsed.overseas_competition_comment: PBKS have multiple overseas pace/all-round options, so overseas-slot competition remains the main XI risk.
parsed.overseas_competition_note: Competes for four overseas spots with Stoinis, Omarzai, Ferguson, Bartlett, Owen, Connolly and Dwarshuis; strong role fit but not uncontested.
parsed.playing_xi_comment: Retained core overseas seam-bowling all-rounder; appears in PBKS match squad listings but no official XI confirmation yet.
